前世の盟約に従い、我が前に集え、聖なるマナよ……。<br>この呪われし右腕が犯し:
By the covenant of a past life, gather before me, O holy Mana...
Please purify the 'sin' my cursed right arm committed last night...
ああ、我が右腕よ……。<br>なぜ、我の意志に背き、愚かな過ちをしたのだ……！:
Ah, my right arm... Why did you defy my will and commit such a foolish
mistake...!
これはこれは、我が司令官ではないか。お見苦しい姿を見られてしまったな。<br>実:
My, my, if it isn't my Commander. You've caught me in a state, atoning
for the foolish deed my cursed right arm committed last night.
っていうか、そ、その……ほ、本当は、昨晩、<br>酒場のグラスを何個も割ってしま:
I mean, w-well, the thing is... Actually, last night, I ended up breaking
several glasses at the tavern...
ルディアさんに酷く怒られてしまったので、<br>ここで反省していたんですよぉ～…: I was severely scolded by Ludia, so I was reflecting on it here...
